plugins.name: maiyu-skills
plugins.description: 59 fullstack development skills — backend (controllers, services, repositories, models, auth, middleware, migrations, testing), frontend (forms, components, data tables, CRUD pages, kanban, rich editor, permissions, stores), and DevOps (Docker, CI/CD). Supports Fastify, Express, NestJS, Next.js, React, Vue and more
